_schema: task-ledger TEMPLATE for hsb-setup — set perk, fill record_store + the vars the perk declares.

vars.REMOTE_ROOT: <remote working dir where the repo lives, e.g. /home/nvidia>
vars.HSB_PLATFORM: <platform hint: 'IGX Orin' / 'AGX Orin' / 'AGX Thor' / 'DGX Spark' (may be empty to auto-detect)>
